fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY, a leveraged ETF designed to track volatility, is highlighted as one of ten leveraged ETFs built to lose value. This suggests significant headwinds and a high probability of value erosion for holders, particularly over extended periods. Investors should be aware of the inherent decay and structural disadvantages associated with such instruments.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose

examples.body: $UVXY Adding big here going into the close!!!!
$UVXY why so flat? Should be minimum 5% down.
